notes: Runtime requires apiSpecId plus at least one selectedEndpointId.
selectedEndpointIds are normalized by backend: empty GUIDs removed, duplicates removed, then sorted ascending.
endpointBusinessContexts keeps only selected endpoint keys with non-empty trimmed values.
generationType, status, and approvalStatus are currently numeric in response JSON.
selectedEndpointCount is computed from selectedEndpointIds after backend normalization.
testCaseCount is populated in list query only. GetById/create/update currently return 0.

endpoints.name: ListTestSuites
notes: Archived suites are excluded from this list.
Current implementation does not perform a separate project existence lookup; no matches return 200 with an empty array.

endpoints.name: GetTestSuiteDetail
problemCases: 404 when suiteId does not exist under the provided projectId.
notes: Current implementation can still return an archived suite if caller knows the suiteId.

endpoints.name: CreateTestSuite
problemCases: 400 ValidationProblemDetails when required body fields are missing or fail DataAnnotations.
400 ProblemDetails for empty projectId/currentUserId, empty selectedEndpointIds after normalization, selected endpoints outside specification, or other handler validation failures.

endpoints.name: UpdateTestSuite
problemCases: 400 ValidationProblemDetails when rowVersion or other required body fields are missing.
400 ProblemDetails for invalid rowVersion format, non-owner update, archived suite update, empty selectedEndpointIds after normalization, or endpoint/spec validation failures.
404 when apiSpecId does not exist or suiteId does not exist under the provided projectId.
409 ProblemDetails with reasonCode=CONCURRENCY_CONFLICT when rowVersion is stale.

endpoints.name: ArchiveTestSuite
problemCases: 400 when rowVersion query is missing or invalid, or current user is not the suite owner.
404 when suiteId does not exist under the provided projectId.
409 ProblemDetails with reasonCode=CONCURRENCY_CONFLICT when rowVersion is stale.
notes: This is a soft archive. Backend sets status to Archived instead of deleting the row.

runtimeRules: Create/update requires apiSpecId and at least one selected endpoint.
selectedEndpointIds are normalized by backend and returned in normalized order.
Business contexts outside the selected scope are silently discarded instead of causing 400.
Update and archive require rowVersion from the latest response.
List excludes archived suites, but GetById does not currently filter them out.
List is the only FE-04 test-suite endpoint that computes testCaseCount.
FE-05A order proposal falls back to persisted TestSuite.SelectedEndpointIds when request.SelectedEndpointIds is empty.

problemDetails409.title: Conflict
problemDetails409.detail: Du lieu da bi thay doi boi nguoi khac. Vui long tai lai va thu lai.
problemDetails409.message: Du lieu da bi thay doi boi nguoi khac. Vui long tai lai va thu lai.

relatedNotes: There is no FE-04 endpoint that returns project-wide scope or all endpoints automatically. FE must send the explicit endpoint selection.
The downstream FE-05A endpoint lives under /api/test-suites/{suiteId}/order-proposals and can reuse the persisted scope snapshot from FE-04.
